title: Workspace Scan Pressure
objective: Start OpenClaw, create a large workspace fixture, restart the gateway, and verify user-facing commands stay responsive without memory, CPU, or health degradation.

phases.title: Start Gateway
phases.intent: Start the target OpenClaw runtime before applying the large workspace fixture.

phases.title: Restart With Large Workspace
phases.intent: Restart the gateway after the large workspace fixture exists so startup and reload paths see filesystem pressure.

phases.title: User-Facing Workspace Commands
phases.intent: Run common user-facing commands that can trigger workspace, model, plugin, or config discovery work.
